name: kanvis-video
description: Kanvis Video turns long-form content into directed video projects and hands finished work to Kanvis Studio.

scripts.check: npm test && node scripts/validate-skill.mjs && node scripts/preflight.mjs --article examples/knowledge-video/article.md --config examples/knowledge-video/kanvis-video.config.json && node scripts/detect-runtime.mjs --config examples/knowledge-video/kanvis-video.config.json && node scripts/validate-scene-plan.mjs examples/knowledge-video/scene-plan.json
